viral_patterns.analysis_basis: View counts, transcripts, and engagement data

patterns.name: Impossible Danger Already Happening
patterns.hook: character already inside the dangerous situation — no buildup
hook_examples: Boulder already rolling toward the truck
Bomb already counting down on the ship
Character already stuck to bicycle seat
patterns.escalation: danger gets worse every 3 seconds — never plateaus
patterns.retention: cliffhanger — threat never fully resolved before cut
patterns.cta_style: story-threat — she's still in there — cut
patterns.dialogue_pattern: STOP. Don't come closer. Go back. Run now.

patterns.name: Sacrifice Twist
patterns.hook: character does something that looks insane or destructive
hook_examples: Rumi jumps out of helicopter
Mira gives up her oxygen mask
Character throws themselves in front of danger
patterns.escalation: the WHY is withheld — audience doesn't understand until emotional peak
patterns.retention: sacrifice cut — action happens, cut before we see outcome
patterns.cta_style: like and subscribe to bring character back / save character
patterns.character_combo: Rumi or Mira solo sacrifice moment
patterns.dialogue_pattern: She jumped. Why did she do that? I got you. I won't let you go.
patterns.dialogue_energy: disbelief → desperate → warm resolution then recut to danger

patterns.name: Absurd Object at Impossible Scale
patterns.hook: oversized or impossible object visible in frame 1 — readable in 0.5 seconds
hook_examples: Giant glowing Christmas tree growing from someone's head
Solid gold airplane built overnight
Laser eyes shooting beams across a city
patterns.emotion: absurd delight + disbelief + need to share
patterns.escalation: the absurd object gets BIGGER or MORE absurd — never explained away
patterns.retention: power flip pending — character figures out how to use the absurdity as a weapon, cut before execution
patterns.cta_style: don't like or subscribe or I'm finished — threat tied to absurd stakes
patterns.character_combo: Rumi as absurdity creator, Mira as skeptical reactor
patterns.dialogue_pattern: I can't control my laser eyes. Problem solved. Thanks Rumi.
patterns.dialogue_energy: casual about the impossible — plays it straight, never winks at camera

patterns.name: Villain Trap Backfire
patterns.hook: villain is caught mid-scheme OR trap is already set and victim is approaching
hook_examples: Zoye putting glue on bicycle seat — we see her doing it
Mira swapping snowboard colors before competition
Trap door already in position as target walks toward it
patterns.escalation: wrong person gets trapped OR trap backfires on creator
patterns.retention: betrayal tease — scheme isn't fully over, cut on Zoye's face as she realizes
patterns.cta_style: if the professor finds out it was me I AM FINISHED so don't like or subscribe
patterns.character_combo: Zoye schemes, Mira or Jinu as victim, Rumi as justice bringer
patterns.dialogue_pattern: Oops. Wrong person. Geneva is going to kill me.

patterns.name: Competition Reversal
patterns.hook: underdog is losing badly — score shown on screen, crowd reacting
hook_examples: Roomie's score way too low — crowd groaning
Rumi on cardboard motorcycle being laughed at
Character already at back of race as others pull ahead
patterns.emotion: secondhand embarrassment → rising hope → triumphant shock
patterns.escalation: cheating is exposed mid-competition — reversal feels earned not lucky
patterns.retention: leave a comment if you want Rumi's revenge — open loop
patterns.cta_style: don't subscribe so Rumi doesn't find out I swapped the boards
patterns.character_combo: Rumi vs Mira — Zoye as interference layer
patterns.dialogue_pattern: Told you it was never about the bike. I said I'd win and I did.
patterns.dialogue_energy: smug delivery on the win line — never shouts the victory

patterns.name: Chaotic Victim Loop
patterns.view_count_evidence: Multiple 500K-700K performers on Daniel Goleman channel — Jinu focus
patterns.hook: Jinu is already suffering something he didn't cause — visible pain or confusion in frame 1
hook_examples: Jinu wakes up to ocean flooding the cabin
Jinu handed empty chip bag as a gift
Jinu stuck as the only one left without a lifeboat
patterns.emotion: relatable suffering + comedy + audience proxy feeling
patterns.escalation: every attempt to fix the situation makes it worse — Jinu is the straight man in chaos
patterns.retention: please like and subscribe to bring Jinu back — victim CTA
patterns.cta_style: please like and subscribe to bring Jinu back
patterns.character_combo: Jinu alone or Jinu + Rumi chaos source
patterns.dialogue_pattern: What's happening? I can't. I physically cannot.
patterns.dialogue_energy: soft disbelief → resigned suffering → one explosive reaction

patterns.name: Hidden Loyalty Reveal
patterns.view_count_evidence: 2.1M (Why Did Rumi Do This), 1.6M (birthday), 8.7M (why are they treating Rumi this way)
patterns.hook: character is being mistreated or excluded — audience immediately feels injustice
hook_examples: Rumi being pushed off stage and excluded
Rumi building her own stage alone
Character doing something secretly generous that others mock
patterns.emotion: injustice anger → hope → emotional payoff when truth revealed
patterns.escalation: humiliation deepens before the truth comes — never resolves too early
patterns.retention: hidden truth — final line reveals what the character was actually doing, cut
patterns.cta_style: they have a heart of gold — please give them a like and subscribe
patterns.character_combo: Rumi as misunderstood hero, Mira + Zoye as antagonists who later feel guilt
patterns.dialogue_pattern: Why didn't you tell us? We want to help too. Yes, together.
patterns.dialogue_energy: quietly emotional — no shouting on the reveal — voice breaks slightly

patterns.name: Roast Battle With Real Stakes
patterns.view_count_evidence: Daniel Goleman channel roast video — full long-form engagement
patterns.hook: character delivers devastating opening burn — target's face visible reacting immediately
hook_examples: Baby opens roast tour with target already in seat
First line lands before target can defend
Audience reaction shot before victim can speak
patterns.emotion: chaotic joy + secondhand embarrassment + loyalty to funniest character
patterns.escalation: each target leaves — room empties — stakes shift to who is truly last standing
patterns.retention: final reveal — last person standing delivers line that reframes the whole roast
patterns.cta_style: none — engagement comes from comment wars about who won
patterns.character_combo: Full cast — Baby as host, Mira as most devastating target, Jinu as funniest victim
patterns.dialogue_pattern: Never said dumbbells could talk. Yet here you are.
patterns.dialogue_energy: deadpan delivery — never breaks — precision over volume

patterns.name: Vlog Chaos Escalation
patterns.hook: vlog opener immediately shows something wrong — fire, flooding, or absurd situation
hook_examples: Kitchen already on fire during cooking segment
House already burned down — group now in forest
Ship already sinking while Jinu calmly vlogs
patterns.emotion: chaos comedy + documentary authenticity + parasocial familiarity
patterns.escalation: each vlog segment ends worse than it started — no scene is safe
patterns.retention: new location cliffhanger — just when survival seems possible, new disaster announced
patterns.cta_style: like and subscribe embedded as vlog comment to fans — character breaks fourth wall naturally
patterns.character_combo: Jinu as host, full cast as chaos sources
patterns.dialogue_pattern: Don't worry. That's just my special effect. Totally safe. I think.
patterns.dialogue_energy: deadpan narrator voice — calm about insane things — contrast IS the comedy

patterns.name: Power Flip From Zero
patterns.view_count_evidence: 8.7M (why are they treating Rumi this way — Kpopzai), 2.6M (shorts #kpop)
patterns.hook: character is at absolute lowest point — humiliated, excluded, or powerless in frame 1
hook_examples: Rumi dragged off stage in front of crowd
Character told they are worthless at the thing they love
Underdog about to lose in front of everyone
patterns.emotion: anger + protectiveness + desperate hope for reversal
patterns.escalation: character builds power from nothing — using the exact thing used against them
patterns.retention: power flip pending — we see the moment the character realizes they can win, cut before execution
patterns.cta_style: drop a heart for Rumi — comment-bait tied to emotional investment
patterns.character_combo: Rumi as zero-to-hero, Mira as witness who is secretly proud
patterns.dialogue_pattern: I'll make my own stage. Help me. Don't you dare like it. She's a loser.
patterns.dialogue_energy: villain sneers at normal volume — hero's power move delivered quietly

highest_retention.reason: WHY withheld until emotional peak — can't leave

banned_patterns: Clean resolution — never used in top performers
Buildup before the hook — top videos start mid-action
Plateau escalation — every beat must be more intense
Complex dialogue over 8 words per line
Multiple actions in one clip — AI fails on this
undersaturated_opportunities: Luxury wealth situation with absurd outcome
International location outside Korea and school
AI or robot character causing chaos
Giant food at competition or event
Supernatural ability that only works at wrong moment
Competition format not yet used on these channels
